case_title: FIROZ RAHAMAN VS. KELLY NUMAIR et. al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NUMAIR, KELLY
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT IJLSF, LLC MAILED TO RESPONDENT RAHAMAN, FIROZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2016 BY DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FIROZ RAHAMAN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KELLY NUMAIR WITH IJLSF, LLC'S REPRESENTATIVE MANDY WATSON. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO MATTER BEING HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS COMPLAINT AGAINST NAMED DEFENDANT KELLY NUMAIR IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF ORALLY AMENDS COMPLAINT TO NAME IJLSF, LLC AS DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT IJLSF, LLC'S REPRESENTATIVE MANDY WATSON WAIVES PROCESS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE AND APPEARS TODAY ON BEHALF OF COMPANY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED "NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL" RECIEVED FOR APPELLANT STATING "RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD".

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-04-2017 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF OCT-25-2016 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FIROZ RAHAMAN AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE, MANDY WATSON, OPERATIONS MANAGER AT IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO (IJLSF), DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Firoz Rahaman, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Mandy Watson as representative for Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent, Firoz Rahaman testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibit (A) Email dated Mar. 8, 2016 from Firoz Rahaman to Kelly Numair.

Appellant representative Mandy Watson testifies and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) Contract/Agreement.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Richard Ulmer; Clerk S. Ravinantapricha; Matter Not Reported.

After the hearing, the Court Affirmed the judgement of the Small Claims Court issued on Oct. 25, 2016. Matter is remanded back to Small Claims Court Division.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-04-17 At 09:40 A.M. In Dept 306

Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Judgment Entered
